title: Acquisition of fully diluted 12.8% of shareholding in Paragraf Limited by MIC UAE Investments 2 RSC Limited
body: "The Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster has made a Final Order under the National Security and Investment Act 2021 in respect to MIC UAE Investments 2 RSC Limited’s acquisition of a minority shareholding in Paragraf Limited. On the same day, the Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster issued a variation to clarify a minor change in articulation of the shareholding. This Public Notice is therefore issued in relation to MIC UAE Investments 2 RSC Limited’s acquisition of a fully diluted shareholding of 7.82% in Paragraf Limited; to be followed by an additional fully diluted acquisition of 4.98%, leading to a total acquisition of 12.8% of Paragraf Limited’s shareholding. "
